tasks.label: Rebuild Jekyll (future posts)
tasks.command: podman machine start >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && podman run --rm --platform linux/amd64 -v "$PWD":/srv/jekyll -v jekyll-gems:/usr/gem docker.io/jekyll/jekyll:pages sh -lc "gem list -i webrick >/dev/null || gem install webrick --no-document; jekyll build --future"
